profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableEmail
service.tagline: Pay-per-send email delivery, inboxes, and custom email subdomains.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableEmail email delivery, inbox, forwarding, and custom subdomain workflows. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableEmail.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableEmail docs and pay-per-use email workflows for agents.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableEmail as required by the provider.
